comment.body: she also said that whether momentum is a bull trap or not isn’t a day trader’s concern. for a swing trader it just means: be ready, don’t get complacent about the upside, and hedge the risk. she always points you to that thread, yet some people here still obsess over it… no wonder they don’t make money in the market
